title: SessionStart hook must be idempotent — Claude triggers it on every session
trap: Wrote a SessionStart hook that appends to CLAUDE.md unconditionally. After 5 sessions the file had 5 duplicate install blocks and one teammate's Claude got confused which one was authoritative.
fix: Probe for a unique marker line (e.g. <!-- insights-share@v0.1 -->) before appending, and exit 0 if it is already present. Also: do not create CLAUDE.md if missing — only augment.
evidence: scripts/append-claude-md.sh:18, original bug surfaced 2026-04-23 in V4teamBrain repo
author: claude-instance@V4teamBrain
